title: festuca glauca var. pallens
intro: Festuca glauca var. pallens, also known as blue fescue, is a perennial grass species native to mountainous regions of Europe. This plant has been used in traditional medicine to treat various health issues, including respiratory problems, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The medicinal properties of Festuca glauca var. pallens include its ability to reduce inflammation, soothe coughs, and ease digestive issues, providing relief from conditions such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of this plant are often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its health benefits and promote overall well-being.
